<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="tr"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0"><title>AI Preview</title><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"><style>*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}body{font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;background-color:#f1f5f9;min-height:100vh;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:flex-start;padding:40px;}.preview-wrapper{background:white;width:100%;max-width:1440px;min-height:3975px;position:relative;box-shadow:0 10px 40px -10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
        .ai-placeholder {
            background-color: #cbd5e1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden; position: relative; box-sizing: border-box; width: 100%; height: 100%; min-height: 50px;
        }
        .ai-placeholder::after { content: ""; display: block; }
        
/* AI CSS */
.page-wrapper {
  position: relative;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  background: rgb(237,238,241);
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 1440px;
  min-height: 3975px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  font-family: Inter;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.orders-page {
  z-index: 1;
  position: absolute;
  left: 0px;
  top: 0px;
  width: 1440px;
  height: 3975px;
  background: rgb(237,238,241);
}

.orders-page__overlay {
  z-index: 2;
  position: absolute;
  left: 0px;
  top: 0px;
  width: 1440px;
  height: 3975px;
  background: rgb(36,38,45);
}

.orders-page__panel {
  z-index: 3;
  position: absolute;
  left: 0px;
  top: 0px;
  width: 1220px;
  height: 3975px;
  background: rgb(237,238,241);
}

.orders-list-head {
  z-index: 4;
  position: absolute;
  left: 80px;
  top: 132px;
  width: 1060px;
  height: 96px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 16px;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: flex-start;
}

.orders-list-head__filters {
  width: 369px;
  max-width: 100%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  height: 32px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 6px;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.chip {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  height: 32px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 10px;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.chip:nth-child(1) {
  width: 57px;
  background: rgb(36,38,45);
  border: 1px solid rgb(0,0,0);
}

.chip:not(:nth-child(1)) {
  background: rgb(255,255,255);
  border: 1px solid rgb(179,185,198);
}

.chip:nth-child(2) {
  width: 122px;
}

.chip:nth-child(3) {
  width: 104px;
}

.chip:nth-child(4) {
  width: 68px;
}

.chip--small {
  height: 24px;
  background: rgb(255,255,255);
  border: 1px solid rgb(179,185,198);
}

.chip--small .chip__primary-text {
  font-size: 12px;
}

.chip--small.chip--success {
  background: rgb(26,205,66);
  border: 1px solid rgb(26,205,66);
}

.chip--small.chip--success .chip__primary-text {
  color: rgb(255,255,255);
}

.chip--small.chip--editable {
  position: relative;
  padding-right: 24px; /* Space for edit icon */
}

.chip--small.chip--editable .chip__base {
  padding-right: 4px; /* Adjust base padding */
}

.chip--error {
  background: rgb(238,80,48);
  border: 1px solid rgb(238,80,48);
}

.chip--error .chip__primary-text {
  color: rgb(255,255,255);
}

.chip__base {
  align-self: stretch;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 4px;
  padding: 4px;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  overflow-x: visible;
}

.chip__text-area {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 4px;
  padding: 0px 4px;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  overflow-x: visible;
}

.chip__primary-text {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: rgb(36,38,45);
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.chip:nth-child(1) .chip__primary-text {
  color: rgb(246,247,249);
}

.chip__badge {
  border-radius: 9999px;
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  background: rgb(238,80,48);
  border: 1px solid rgb(255,160,160);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.chip__edit-icon {
  position: absolute;
  right: 4px;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;

}

.orders-list-head__actions {
  align-self: stretch;
  width: 1060px;
  max-width: 100%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  height: 48px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 4px;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.button {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  height: 48px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  background: rgb(255,255,255);
